name: Keifuku Electric Railroad Co.,Ltd.
summary: Keifuku Electric Railroad Co., Ltd. engages in the railway iron track and cableway business in Japan. It is also involved in the sale of land buildings; and lease of stadium, hotels, building, residence, store, apartment, racecourse, and boat facilities. In addition, the company sells food and beverages; and operates restaurants and merchandise stores. Keifuku Electric Railroad Co., Ltd. was founded in 1942 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.
